description: execute_sql tool truncates the result JSON at 8000 chars via _trim(), producing invalid JSON (unterminated string) that the LLM cannot parse — any query with long ORGANIZATION_NM strings or ~50 rows of mid-size data corrupts the tool_result and the model proceeds without seeing the data
reproducer: .venv/bin/python -c "import json; from text2sql.tools import _trim; rows=[['name '+str(i)*100, 1.0] for i in range(50)]; t=_trim(json.dumps({'rows':rows,'columns':['A','B'],'ok':True,'row_count':50,'truncated':False}, ensure_ascii=False),8000); json.loads(t)" → JSONDecodeError 'Unterminated string'

description: assert_select_only's _FORBIDDEN regex matches DDL/DML keywords inside legitimate string literals and SQL comments, rejecting valid queries — e.g. WHERE ORGANIZATION_NM LIKE '%UPDATE%' or /* compute month delete date */ are blocked as UnsafeSQLError
reproducer: .venv/bin/python -c "from text2sql.db import assert_select_only; assert_select_only(\"SELECT ORGANIZATION_NM FROM client_product WHERE ORGANIZATION_NM LIKE '%UPDATE%'\")" → UnsafeSQLError

description: validate_result only checks numeric_ranges/non_null over the LLM-supplied rows_preview (≤50 rows) but row_count covers up to 1000 rows; out-of-range values or NULLs in rows 51..N silently pass validation as 'Все проверки пройдены'
reproducer: .venv/bin/python -c "from text2sql.tools import tool_validate_result; print(tool_validate_result(['PNL_SUM'], 200, [[i*1000] for i in range(50)], {'min_rows':1,'numeric_ranges':{'PNL_SUM':{'min':0}}}))" → ok:true with no issues

description: Empty result-set with no explicit min_rows expectation returns ok=true — PREMORTEM #3 confirmed: queries for MONTH_DT outside available range (e.g. 'доход за июль 2025' when DB has only до 2025-06-30) get row_count=0 → validation passes → model can answer 'доход = 0'
reproducer: .venv/bin/python -c "from text2sql.tools import tool_validate_result; print(tool_validate_result(['X'],0,[],None))" → ok:true

description: No timeout on client.chat.completions.create(); if Ollama hangs (cold-load, model offloaded to swap), CLI blocks indefinitely with no recovery — only oracledb has call_timeout=60s, LLM client has none
reproducer: code path: agent.py:93-99 creates OpenAI client without timeout kwarg; llm.py:12-15 also omits timeout

description: When the model returns plain text without tool_calls, agent.run_agent returns it as final answer WITHOUT running validate_result and WITHOUT linking to actual supporting_data — model hallucinations replace verified SQL numbers (Run 1 and Run 4 in EVIDENCE.md exhibit this fallback path on success, but the same path silently accepts hallucinated numbers)
reproducer: agent.py:122-126 returns msg.content as answer with supporting_data=None whenever model omits final_answer tool

description: No semantic guard against summing TOTAL field with its components (PNL_SUM + PL_CA + PL_DEP + …, FX_VOLUME_RUB + FX_EUR_VOLUME_RUB, CA_LCY_SUM + CA_LCY_RUB_SUM); only soft system-prompt instruction. validate_result inspects shape, not metric semantics, so a 1.5–2× inflated answer passes all checks
reproducer: metadata.py:144,179,268 explicitly warn; no code in tools.py or db.py checks SQL text for forbidden pair co-occurrence

description: Truncated result-set (>1000 rows) sets truncated=True in tool_result but neither validate_result nor system prompt mandates checking it; on 'средний доход по клиентам' without aggregation the model averages the first 1000 rows and reports that as the full-DB average
reproducer: db.py:84-86 fetches max_rows+1 rows; tool_validate_result ignores 'truncated' field entirely (tools.py:107-192 never inspects it); system prompt agent.py:27-53 never instructs model about truncation

description: _recover_from_empty_reply matches the substring '"ok": true' AND '"rows"' to pick the last SQL result, but the recovery prompt sends the response_model only the LAST execute_sql tool_result — if the model ran several SQL probes (e.g. first MIN/MAX(MONTH_DT) probe, then the actual answer query), the recovery may grab the wrong one and answer about the probe
reproducer: agent.py:191-202 iterates messages and overwrites last_sql_result on every match without preferring the most informative one

description: SQL injection / syntax-break via apostrophes in NL-derived filter values — model concatenates company name literally via UPPER('Лукойл') template; an input like 'доход компании D'Lucky' produces UPPER('D'Lucky') → ORA-01756. No bind-parameter API exposed to model. PREMORTEM #5 confirms unmitigated.
reproducer: agent.py:45 system prompt mandates string concatenation; tools.py:316 passes raw sql; no params channel

description: tool_final_answer returns text.strip() even if model passes empty string; if model invokes final_answer with text='' (or only supporting_data), CLI prints blank line on stdout — grader scraping last stdout line gets empty string while exit=0
reproducer: tools.py:200 returns text.strip() unconditionally; __main__.py:62 prints it

description: OracleClient.execute opens a fresh oracledb.connect() per execute_sql call (no pooling, no persistent connection); each agent step that hits SQL pays the full TCP+auth handshake (~hundreds ms each), and call_timeout is set after connect but conn is closed at block exit
reproducer: db.py:79-93 'with self.connect() as conn' inside execute() — runs on every tool call
